_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder for embedded PDF viewer

title: Introduction to Version Control
subtitle: Track Changes, Save History, Work Smarter!
overview: Students learn the concept of Version Control, understand why developers use Git, and explore how save history helps track changes, recover old versions, and collaborate efficiently. A simple Git GUI demonstration introduces commits, repositories, and version history.

images._note: Add screenshots of Git GUI software, commit history, repositories, and student activities.

gallery.caption: Creating a commit to save changes

keyTopics: Collaboration and teamwork using Version Control

youtubeVideos.title: Git and GitHub for Beginners
youtubeVideos.desc: Simple introduction to Git and version control.

youtubeVideos.title: What is Version Control?
youtubeVideos.desc: Understanding save history and project tracking.

youtubeVideos.title: Git GUI Tutorial
youtubeVideos.desc: Using a graphical interface for Git.

activity.title: Save History Demonstration
steps: Create a text file named notes.txt
Edit the file and add more content
View commit history in Git GUI
Restore the first version and compare changes

options: A method of tracking file changes over time
quiz.explanation: Version Control keeps track of changes made to files and projects.
Git is one of the most widely used Version Control Systems.

quiz.q: What is a Commit in Git?
quiz.explanation: A commit acts like a save point in project history.

options: A project folder tracked by Git
quiz.explanation: A repository stores project files and version history.

options: It allows recovery of older versions
quiz.explanation: Developers can return to earlier versions whenever needed.

quiz.q: Which tool helps visualize Git without commands?
quiz.explanation: Git GUI tools provide graphical interfaces for Git operations.
Git allows multiple developers to work together efficiently.

quiz.q: What can you do using Git history?

quiz.explanation: Good commit messages help understand project history.

quiz.q: Which of the following is a real-world example of Version Control?
options: Keeping multiple drafts of a document
quiz.explanation: Version Control works like keeping organized drafts with history.
